name: Alert
notes: Add your Proficiency Bonus to Initiative; after rolling, you may swap Initiative with a willing ally.

name: Crafter
notes: Gain proficiency with three artisan’s tools; 20% discount on nonmagical items; craft temporary gear after a long rest.

name: Healer
notes: As an action, and by consuming one use of a Healer's Kit, you can allow a creature to spend a Hit Die. They regain hit points equal to the die plus your Proficiency Bonus. You reroll 1s on dice used for any healing purpose.

name: Lucky
notes: Spend Luck Points to gain advantage on a d20 test or impose disadvantage on an attack against you (Proficiency Bonus times per day).

name: Magic Initiate
notes: Learn 2 cantrips and 1 1st-level spell; cast the spell once per long rest for free.

name: Musician
notes: Proficiency with three instruments; grant Heroic Inspiration to allies after a rest.

name: Savage Attacker
notes: Once per turn, roll weapon damage twice and use either result.

name: Skilled
notes: Gain proficiency in three skills or tools of your choice.

name: Tavern Brawler
notes: Unarmed strikes now deal 1d4+strength modifier damage. Reroll any 1's on an unarmed attack. Once per turn, you can push 5ft on an unarmed hit.

name: Tough
notes: Increase maximum HP by double your level; gain +2 HP per level thereafter.

name: Actor
notes: Advantage on Deception/Performance while disguised. When mimicking any noise, the fake can only be detected on successful DC8 + PB + CHA modifier Insight check.

name: Athlete
notes: Climb speed; stand with 5 ft movement; improved running jumps.

name: Charger
notes: Dash distance +10 ft; moving 10+ ft before a melee hit adds damage or pushes target.

name: Crossbow Expert
notes: Ignore Loading; no disadvantage in melee; add modifier to bonus attack damage.

name: Crusher
notes: Bludgeoning hits can push; critical hits grant advantage to allies.

name: Defensive Duelist
notes: Reaction: add PB to AC against a melee attack.

name: Dual Wielder
notes: Use two-weapon fighting with more weapons; draw/stow two weapons.

name: Durable
notes: Advantage on death saves; spend Hit Die as bonus action to heal.

name: Grappler
notes: Unarmed strikes can grapple; advantage vs grappled targets; move grappled creatures.

name: Great Weapon Master
notes: Extra damage with heavy weapons; bonus attack on crit or kill.

name: Polearm Master
notes: Bonus attack with polearm; reaction attack when enemies enter reach.

name: Sentinel
notes: Opportunity attacks stop movement; trigger on disengage or ally attacks.

name: Sharpshooter
notes: Ignore cover; no disadvantage at long range or in melee for ranged attacks.

name: Skulker
notes: Blindsight 10 ft; advantage on Stealth in combat; missed attacks don’t reveal position.

name: Slasher
notes: Reduce speed on hit; critical hits impose disadvantage on attacks.

name: Speedy
notes: Speed +10 ft; ignore difficult terrain when dashing; opportunity attacks vs you have disadvantage.

name: War Caster
notes: Advantage on concentration saves; cast spells as reactions; perform somatic components with hands occupied.

name: Weapon Master
notes: Gain mastery with a chosen weapon type; change after a long rest.

name: Ability Score Improvement
notes: Increase one ability score by 2, or increase two ability scores by 1 each (maximum 20).

name: Chef
notes: +1 Constitution or Wisdom. Gain proficiency with Cook’s Utensils. During a Short or Long Rest, you can cook for allies to grant extra healing, and you can prepare treats that grant Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Elemental Adept
notes: +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder. Your spells ignore Resistance to that type, and 1s on damage dice of that type count as 2s.

name: Fey-Touched
notes: +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Misty Step and one level 1 Divination or Enchantment spell are always prepared; each can be cast once for free per Long Rest.

name: Heavily Armored
notes: +1 Strength or Constitution. Gain proficiency with Heavy armor.

name: Heavy Armor Master
notes: +1 Strength or Constitution. While wearing Heavy armor, reduce Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage taken by your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Inspiring Leader
notes: +1 Wisdom or Charisma. After a Short or Long Rest, you can inspire up to six creatures; each gains Temporary Hit Points equal to your character level plus the modifier of the ability increased by this feat.

name: Keen Mind
notes: +1 Intelligence. Choose Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, or Religion; gain proficiency in that skill, or Expertise if already proficient. You can take the Study action as a Bonus Action.

name: Lightly Armored
notes: +1 Strength or Dexterity. Gain proficiency with Light armor and Shields.

name: Mage Slayer
notes: +1 Strength or Dexterity. When you damage a concentrating creature, it has Disadvantage on its Concentration save. Once per rest, you can turn a failed Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma save into a success.

name: Martial Weapon Training
notes: +1 Strength or Dexterity. Gain proficiency with Martial weapons.

name: Medium Armor Master
notes: +1 Strength or Dexterity. While wearing Medium armor, you can add up to 3 to AC from Dexterity instead of 2, if your Dexterity score is 16 or higher.

name: Moderately Armored
notes: +1 Strength or Dexterity. Gain proficiency with Medium armor.

name: Mounted Combatant
notes: +1 Strength, Dexterity, or Wisdom. Gain Advantage on attacks against smaller unmounted creatures, and your mount takes only half damage on failed Dexterity saves from effects that target you while mounted.

name: Observant
notes: +1 Intelligence or Wisdom. Choose Insight, Investigation, or Perception; gain proficiency in that skill, or Expertise if already proficient. You can take the Search action as a Bonus Action.

name: Piercer
notes: +1 Strength or Dexterity. Once per turn, reroll one damage die of a Piercing attack. On a critical hit with Piercing damage, roll one additional damage die.

name: Poisoner
notes: +1 Dexterity or Intelligence. Your Poison damage ignores Resistance. After a Long Rest, you can brew one poison dose worth 50 GP that deals 2d8 Poison damage.

name: Resilient
notes: +1 to one ability score for which you lack saving throw proficiency. Gain saving throw proficiency with that ability.

name: Ritual Caster
notes: +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. A number of level 1 Ritual spells equal to your Proficiency Bonus are always prepared. You can cast one prepared Ritual quickly for free once per Long Rest.

name: Shadow-Touched
notes: +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Invisibility and one level 1 Illusion or Necromancy spell are always prepared; each can be cast once for free per Long Rest.

name: Shield Master
notes: +1 Strength. Shield Bash can push a target 5 feet or knock it Prone once per turn. You can use your Reaction to take no damage on a successful Dexterity save.

name: Skill Expert
notes: +1 to one ability score. Gain proficiency in one skill, and gain Expertise in one skill in which you are already proficient.

name: Spell Sniper
notes: +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. Spell attacks ignore Cover, suffer no Disadvantage in melee, and attack spell range increases by 60 feet when the spell's range is at least 10 feet.

name: Telekinetic
notes: +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. You learn Mage Hand with increased range and invisibility, and as a Bonus Action you can try to shove a target 5 feet with telekinetic force.

name: Telepathic
notes: +1 Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma. You can speak telepathically to one creature within 60 feet that shares a language with you. Detect Thoughts is prepared, and you can cast it once for free per Long Rest.

name: Archery
notes: +2 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons.

name: Blind Fighting
notes: Blindsight 10 ft.

name: Defense
notes: +1 bonus to AC while wearing armor.

name: Dueling
notes: +2 damage when wielding a single one-handed melee weapon.

name: Great Weapon Fighting
notes: Treat 1s and 2s on damage dice as 3s for two-handed/versatile melee weapons.

name: Interception
notes: Reaction: reduce damage to an ally within 5 ft by 1d10 + PB.

name: Protection
notes: Reaction: impose disadvantage on attacks against an adjacent ally.

name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
notes: +2 damage with thrown weapons.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
notes: Add ability modifier to off-hand attack damage.

name: Unarmed Fighting
notes: Unarmed strike damage increases; deal extra damage to a grappled creature each turn.

name: Boon of Combat Prowess
notes: When you miss with an attack roll, you can turn it into a hit a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
notes: As a bonus action, teleport up to 30 feet a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Energy Resistance
notes: Gain resistance to one damage type; you can further reduce that damage once per turn.

name: Boon of Fate
notes: Add or subtract a d10 from a creature’s d20 roll within 60 ft, a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Fortitude
notes: Increase maximum HP by 40; when you would be reduced to 0 HP, you can instead regain HP equal to your Constitution modifier. You can’t do so again until the start of your next turn.

name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
notes: Your bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage ignores resistance.

name: Boon of Luck
notes: Reroll failed d20 tests a number of times per long rest equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

name: Boon of Recovery
notes: As a bonus action, regain significant HP once per long rest.

name: Boon of Skill
notes: Gain proficiency in all skills and add a bonus die to ability checks.

name: Boon of Speed
notes: Your walking speed increases significantly, and opportunity attacks against you have Disadvantage.

name: Boon of Spell Recall
notes: Once per Long Rest, you can regain one expended spell slot of mid level or lower without resting.

name: Boon of Truesight
notes: Gain truesight out to a significant range, commonly 60 feet.
